programmes.show_description: Programmes Start at 07:00.
The Tortoise: Pixie, Tiny Toot and Gato travel out into the universe. The stars play little tunes when they jump around on them. They meet a tired turtle carrying the entire solar system.
The Hedgehog: A hedgehog is scurrying around in the shrubbery, getting ready to hibernate, but most of the spots are taken. Tiny Toot and her friends help the hedgehog find a nice nest.
Happy loves his naps, but he hates missing out on fun times.
Bus: During a game of bus, passenger Mum is too scared to tell bus driver Dad that she secretly loves him, until she gets some help from the Grannies.
Zanders Spaceship: Oswaldo, Leia and Tobias go play a new VR space game with Zander. They realize that Zander is so focused on getting all the trophies that he has become a tyrant.
Anti Leia: To help Oswaldo and Tobias get more interested in their homework about a book, Leia pretends to be more rebel like the character from the book.
Daniel gets upset when Margaret spills juice on his favorite stuffed animal, Tigey. Daniel learns how he can make himself feel better when he's upset.
Oxygen & Carbon take on jobs as chefs in Sodium's restaurant, but their over-enthusiasm to impress causes mayhem and risks Helium getting her special order.
Dee encourages a friend to say 'shoes' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. This episode is all about shoes - brown shoes, blue shoes, shiny shoes and new shoes.
The four adventure-seeking superheroes must try to stop some runaway Chinese drums as they roll towards the Forbidden City.
It's secret agent time when Mojo and Bo think Didi the tractor is up to something fishy. But can the two supersecret spies follow her without being spotted?
The Lost Egg: Ollie and Titus discover a tiny abandoned egg in the attic! Everyone wants to adopt it: Nina, the dinos... even the Woodleys' chicken!
Knight-osaurus: Teeny Rex wants to impress Bella! Titus creates an amazing costume, turning him into the Sir Handsome-Knight.

programmes.show_name: Lex and Plu Space Taxi Drivers
programmes.show_description: A Sleepwalk to Remember: Fur Taxi receives an invitation to a taxi conference Lex and Plu are dispatched to a customer. Today they have to deliver a passenger who's prone to sleepwalking.
The Mime Badge: The Squirrels learn how to mime, with Duggee showing them his impressive skills.
The Why Badge: Why do Tag's feet hurt? The answer is right there under the Squirrels' noses.
Hugo and Sonia learn the value of observation when their rocket experiment doesn't turn out as they had hoped. (SL)
When Dad's present doesn't go to plan, Sonia and Hugo learn that their time together is a gift in itself. (SL)
Joe and Ozzy attend a Messy Play class where they get stuck in and, well, messy. (SL)
The Tortoise: Pixie, Tiny Toot and Gato travel out into the universe. The stars play little tunes when they jump around on them. They meet a tired turtle carrying the entire solar system.
The Hedgehog: A hedgehog is scurrying around in the shrubbery, getting ready to hibernate, but most of the spots are taken. Tiny Toot and her friends help the hedgehog find a nice nest.
Happy loves his naps, but he hates missing out on fun times.
The Friendship Parade: The friends are excited to go on a camping trip, but Zip is nervous about being in a dark place away from home. Can he overcome his fears?
A cauldron in Henry's house wishes it was a magic cauldron that could create spells rather than carry sweets. Henry helps the cauldron prepare a magic spell by becoming a wizard.
Art park: Peggy is judging an exciting art contest, but a big storm has put it in jeopardy. Can Stanley save the event, and who will win the competition?
Snow: Stanley makes a snowplough to help the town on a very snowy day.
Pre-school animation about a young girl whose enthusiasm infects everyone around her.
Caimileon Cóiméid: Le linn siúlóid spáis, ní chreideann Zuzu gur chuala Bubby canadh ag teacht ó chóiméad, ach tá níos mó ag baint leis an gcóiméad seo ná mar a fheictear don tsúil!
Atosú Achrannach: Tar éis do Bubby cuimhne Shelby a scriosadh trí thimpiste, ceapann Zuzu gur féidir léi córas slándála Shelby a shárú agus gach rud a chur i gceart.
When the gang plays with paper planes, Ethan begins to wonder how planes stay in the air. They meet up with Speedy the Plane, who tells them how wings work.
Brewster, Maggie and the twins are trying to fly kites but there is no wind. They wonder 'Where does the wind come from?'
Tá Peppa agus a cairde ag spraoi sa gclubtheach. Tá cuntar sa gClubtheach ar féidir é oscailt amach.
Tá Peppa agus a cairde ag spraoi sa gclubtheach. Tagann na páistí aníos le scéalta taiscéalaíochta faoi ainmhithe fiáine, agus tá cead ag na tuismitheoirí spraoi freisin.
Bo wants to go on holiday. Everyone comes together to create a fun Aer na nÓg for her.
Ar Ais Chuig An Lochán: Músclaíonn frog atá caillte Oona agus a deartháir beag i lár na hoíche.
Na Clocha A Thit: Tá clocha i ndiaidh an bealach isteach go pluais Bernie a bhlocáil agus Bernie sáinnithe istigh ann. An mbeidh Oona agus a cairde ábalta cuidiú leis?
Simon is trying to write a song but is having trouble finding the right words.
Lake Friend: While playing by the lake, the group accidentally drop a ball into the lake. When Reggie tries to retrieve it, Kenny tells him a frightening tale of a creature living in the lake.
Andy Day travels back 106 million years to the time of the Leaellynasaura - a dinosaur that lived in Australia. Along the way he battles with a deadly polar allosaurus.
It's secret agent time when Mojo and Bo think Didi the tractor is up to something fishy. But can the two supersecret spies follow her without being spotted?

Mission: Stormy Mountain: Dan and Jamie ride the chair lift to the top of the mountain to warn some hikers that the resort is closing because of a storm.
Bells: While out for an afternoon stroll with Granny, Maddie + Triggs discover an old bell tower and are surprised to hear a friendly voice welcoming them inside.

Tugann Peppa cúnamh do Danny Dog a sheomra a dhéanamh suas agus piocann siad an téama foghlaithe agus ollphéisteanna mara.
Tá Peppa agus a cairde ag an nGrúpa Spraoi le Madame Gazelle. Tá na páistí ag foghlaim faoin aimsir agus déanann siad stáisiún aimsire.

programmes.show_name: Thomas and Friends: All Engines Go
programmes.show_description: Baaatastrophe: When Thomas' delivery of sheep goes baaaad, he worries that Annie and Clarabel will think he's not good at his job.
Bells: While out for an afternoon stroll with Granny, Maddie + Triggs discover an old bell tower and are surprised to hear a friendly voice welcoming them inside.

programmes.show_name: Nina and the Neurons: Earth Explorers
programmes.show_description: Gravity: Nina investigates how bridges are made with the help of Luke, her sight neuron.
Mission: Stormy Mountain: Dan and Jamie ride the chair lift to the top of the mountain to warn some hikers that the resort is closing because of a storm.
Níos Mó: Tomhaiseann MeMo agus BaBa rudaí atá níos mó agus níos lú ná a chéile. Tá bóín Dé i bhfad níos lú ná MeMo agus BaBa.
Programmes Start at 07:00.
Programmes Start at 07:00.
The Potatoes: Tiny Toot, Gato and Pixie go on a picnic with a potato mum and her potato babies. Tiny Toot takes them on some wild rides in the ecolo-wagon.
The Seahorse: On a visit to the coral reef, Tiny Toot sees a seahorse dad give birth to seahorse babies. Tiny Toot helps seahorse mum dress the little seahorse babies so they won't be cold.
The Sunny River critters are having the best time ever, until Kindly Giant takes her ball home....
Queens: Bingo and Bluey play a game of Queens and take turns being the Queen and her Butler, but when they both want to be Butler, Mum gets crowned after Dad's short stint as a Queen.
Grandpa Waldo: Oswaldo is upset because his grandpa's party is on the same day as Zander's video game rental shop sale. Grandpa also doesn't seem very happy and proposes a deal with Oswaldo.
Parents and Children: On Christmas Eve, Marylee, Mr Ramirez and Oswaldo's Dad are trying to buy a new spaceship toy for their kids.
Daniel is having a hard day at school, but he knows just how to make himself feel better: by hugging his Tigey!
Sulfur & Phosphorus desperately try to sneak into Oxygen's party, not knowing that the party is actually a surprise party for them.
Dee encourages a friend to say 'milk' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. There's white milk, pink milk, baby milk and banana milk.
Grandmaster Glitch's digging floods Wieliczka Saltmine. The Go Jetters must save the famous salt statues.
Jackson's big, blue chicken-thing, Ludwig, is going to lay an egg. And it's up to Mojo and Bo to carry the big bird across dangerous roads to Preston's egg-hatching shed!
Rabbit Run: Ollie volunteers to watch the Woodleys' bunny... easy, she thinks! But the little rascal dashes all over Attic Town, and she can't keep up.
The Challenger: Bradbury wants to play with the dinos, but Teeny Rex refuses, saying he's too small. Cephy is thrilled to have a new friend.

programmes.show_name: Lex and Plu Space Taxi Drivers
programmes.show_description: Frenemy Number One: Fur Taxi needs to complete its 1,000th fare in order to receive the 'Advanced Driver' sticker from the Driver Motivation Society, but the phone has been silent.
The Sibling Badge: Roly reveals he's expecting a new baby brother or sister. The Squirrels have questions.
The Monster Badge: Plinky is the cutest, most adorable creature, but she wants to earn her monster badge.
When a football game ends in a draw, Sonia, Hugo and their friends are excited to learn that a draw means both teams win! (SL)
When a leak in their paddling pool stops Sonia and Hugo from playing, they find another way to have fun in it. (SL)
Joe meets Shay and his coach Ken at the bowling alley where they all learn how to bowl and celebrate with chocolate milkshakes at the end. (SL)
The Potatoes: Tiny Toot, Gato and Pixie go on a picnic with a potato mum and her potato babies. Tiny Toot takes them on some wild rides in the ecolo-wagon.
The Seahorse: On a visit to the coral reef, Tiny Toot sees a seahorse dad give birth to seahorse babies. Tiny Toot helps seahorse mum dress the little seahorse babies so they won't be cold.
The Sunny River critters are having the best time ever, until Kindly Giant takes her ball home....
The Big Thank You: The friends are throwing Helping Hand an amazing party. But with so much to do, can Phoebe work with her friends to get everything ready in time?
Henry meets a comic book in a comic book store, but there was a mistake at the printers and his last few pages are missing!
Power: Butterflies on Stanley's solar panels mean he has no power for his vehicles or his Can-Bots!
Shipwreck: Hettie has discovered a map leading to the pirate Blue Whiskers' sunken ship and is eager to retrieve it as an exhibit for the museum.
Pre-school animation about a young girl whose enthusiasm infects everyone around her.
Féasta Réaltra: Tá Zuzu ar bís féasta Grúiblín a chócaráil dá cairde ach ní maith le Adam bia nua a thriail... go dtí go bhfhoghlaimíonn sé gur féidir le heachtraí bia a bheith spraíúil!
Cath na gCathaoireacha: Nuair a bhíonn deisiúcháin ag teastáil ó Speedy.
Brewster and Maggie visit Brandon Badger. He wonders, 'Why do trees get rid of their leaves in autumn?'
Brewster, Maggie and Ginger Squirrel see the sunset on the beach. Ginger wonders: Where does the sun go after dark? So they ask Sunny Sun.
Tá cara nua ag Peppa sa ngrúpa spraoi, Lotte Lama. Is féidir léi teanga eile a labhairt. Is breá le Peppa a bheith ag caint, is breá le gach duine a bheith ag caint!
Déanann Peppa agus a cairde ceardaíocht adhmaid shimplí den chéad uair sa gcoill in éineacht le Mr Wolf.
It's a very cold day in Tír na nÓg. To warm-up Fionn is teaching an exercise class and Bó is knitting some legwarmers. Gearóid makes a warm soup for Oisín.
Cumha ar Ghráinneog Bheag!: Tá Spiky an ghráinneog bheag caillte. Ach nuair a théann Oona le cuidiú a fháil óna tuismitheoirí, imíonn Baba le Spiky lena mhamaí a fháil.
Silky agus an t-ochtapas: Tagann Silky agus Oona ar ainmhí aisteach a bhfuil ocht lámh air agus iad ar eachtra faoi uisce. Tá Oona ag iarraidh é a fhiosrú ach níl Silky rómhuiníneach.
Diva is under the weather. Could it be that it is just a case of a little TLC that will bring her back to a full bill of health?
The Rock Hop: Enjoying a solitary morning stroll beneath the sky, Nemi, lost in thought, inadvertently walks into a swarm of bees!
Andy Day travels back in time to the era of the ammonites, which inhabited Earth 149 million years ago. They were a type of mollusc that lived in shoals in the sea.
Jackson's big, blue chicken-thing, Ludwig, is going to lay an egg. And it's up to Mojo and Bo to carry the big bird across dangerous roads to Preston's egg-hatching shed!

programmes.show_name: Thomas and Friends: All Engines Go
